outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated: Negative 0DTE GEX (-0.03B) clashes with positive Weekly GEX, creating instability at the 660 pivot.
outlook.summary: Market is pinned at the 660.0 RESONANCE level, the exact intersection of the Weekly Gamma Flip and massive 0DTE Put Open Interest. Dealers are fighting to hold this line. A break below triggers negative gamma acceleration (volatility spike); hold suggests a reversion towards Max Pain (674).

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Massive 0DTE Put OI (106k) aligns perfectly with Weekly Gamma Flip (660.02). This is the critical 'Line in the Sand' for dealer hedging.
RESONANCE: Confluence of structural support with heavy Put OI in 0DTE (105k), Weekly (17k), and Monthly (66k). Primary backstop if 660 fails.
CONFLUENCE: Dominant Call OI in Weekly (27k) coincides with 0DTE Call resistance (17k). Defines the upper boundary of the trading range.
Weekly Max Pain level acting as a magnetic target if spot sustains above the 660 flip zone. Represents dealer optimal pricing.
0DTE Friction level with extreme Call Volume (68k) against low OI (5k). Indicates aggressive intraday speculation/covering just below spot.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low: Positive aggregate GEX suppresses volatility.
outlook.summary: Market is pinned between the 0DTE Max Pain (589) and the massive 600 Call Wall. Spot aligns exactly with the Weekly Gamma Flip (593), indicating a critical inflection point. Positive GEX suggests dealers will suppress volatility, favoring mean reversion towards 589.
